bullets.title: Effort is climbing.
bullets.text: Bringsjord emails ran 129% above baseline this week — 31/day vs 13.5. Activity is the leading indicator and it is pointing up.

bullets.title: Pipeline quality is strong.
bullets.text: Only 9% of 362 active deals lack a value. Nearly every open deal is a real, qualified opportunity.

bullets.title: Revenue is on the board.
bullets.text: $1.6M closed year-to-date across 21 deals, $50k of it in June.
